# Afribit Repository Instructions

- Never place developer-facing, roadmap-facing, or implementation-facing copy on public pages or in public UI components.
- Public-facing content must read for visitors, donors, partners, or community members, not for developers.
- Do not ship placeholder text such as internal notes, TODO language, "what comes next", implementation status, or editorial reminders in visible page content.
- When public pages need future-facing messaging, write it as audience-facing mission or impact copy instead of internal planning language.
